title: Interest quiz
content:
## Interest quiz Kairoro Kaingākau
Do the quiz to discover your top interests and get career ideas.
How the Interest quiz works ,
Ka pēhea te kairoro Kaingākau e mahi ai
- Step 1 Answer questions about your interests Tell us what you like.
Answer questions about your interests
Tell us what you like.
- Step 2 Discover your top interests Find out what these interests mean.
Discover your top interests
Find out what these interests mean.
- Step 3 Get career ideas Explore work areas that may fit your interests.
Explore work areas that may fit your interests.

### , How the Interest quiz works Ka pēhea te kairoro Kaingākau e mahi ai
Discover your top interests and find career ideas.
Duration — 1:57 mins

## Guides , Ngā aratohu
- Guide About the Interest quiz Mō te kairoro Kaingākau Discover how the Interest quiz finds your top interests and uses them to suggest career ideas.

### About the Interest quiz

### Mō te kairoro Kaingākau
Discover how the Interest quiz finds your top interests and uses them to suggest career ideas.
- Guide How to find your career path Me pēhea te kimi i tō huarahi aramahi A step-by-step guide to exploring your values, skills and interests. It’s important to know what these are so you can choose a career path and find a job that fits with who you are.

### How to find your career path

### Me pēhea te kimi i tō huarahi aramahi
A step-by-step guide to exploring your values, skills and interests. It’s important to know what these are so you can choose a career path and find a job that fits with who you are.
- Guide Know your skills Kia mōhio ki ō pūkenga A skill is the ability to do something. If you know your skills, it’s easier to describe them to employers and convince them you’re the right person for the job.

### Kia mōhio ki ō pūkenga
A skill is the ability to do something. If you know your skills, it’s easier to describe them to employers and convince them you’re the right person for the job.
